reviews.review_title: Im Making A Revial of this game
reviews.review_description: (UPDATE: So I grabbed the game This will take a bit) So This Game Was My  whole Memory I just remember this game in like 2023 "I LOVE THIS GAME ITS SO FUN AND SO SCARY!" Then in like maybe 2025 it came back so fun and stuff. Then in like 2026 or late 2025 It said I'm in a old version.I cried that this game was gone. Then Today Or Somthing, I know how to make revivals so just to say this game is coming back by me, well I don't know if it will work so yea. Wait or look at this review until there's a link to the revival. META WHEN I'M GOING TO PUT THE LINK, DO NOT REMOVE THIS,the fans of the game will love this!

reviews.review_title: I miss this game when it was Available
reviews.review_description: I remember all those memories I made in the game throughout 2022-2024. I miss those days where I would be excited to get home to hop on Catos vr, I miss all the friends I made on there.. but all good things have an ending. Rest in peace Catos vr, I will miss this game..

reviews.review_title: All Good things must come to a end
reviews.review_description: I had a fun time playing this game and will like to see it come back I remember actually being scared on vr for once plus I love cats and I love bread so playing this game was fun anyway peace have fun making and updating dread or dead here’s a rose for this games proper burial 🌹￼￼

reviews.review_title: When is the revival coming out

reviews.review_description: This game was peak

Hello, it’s DRPEPPER and before this game released I used to play the other catos Vr, and then the other one shutdown, and then on the discord I discovered this game, it was a true blast to the past, and I like the little grave for Toby, unfortunately, this one is shut down, so now I am asking you to bring it back
Plsssssss
PLEASE SPEED I NEED THIS MY VR IS KINDA BORING WITHOUT THIS GAME…. I LIVE MY GTAG FANGAMES THAT SUCK…

Please bring back the game the game was absolute perfected but the game just died out I still remember the old times when we cat would collect materials and material hallway add get chase down in death. Hall and when are the lights died i still get reminded of the old times but if the creator is read i just gotta tell you that bring back the game please 😭
This game was so fun idk why they took down the servers

was fun tho

great elevator music

reviews.review_title: I almost got banned for no reason
reviews.review_description: So it was about a week ago i get on happy to be back and i havent played for 3 weeks and someone says “you are getting banned im on the phone with the owner” and i said this has to be some sort of of troll but the owner gets in the game they thought i was some guy that broke rules 1-3 but i didnt i told the owner to take a screenshot of my userid so if he sees the guy breaking the rules again he can compare the userids but its still an amazing game i would recommend it
Very good game with effort pur into it

I remember playing this game back in 2022-2023 but the game hasn’t updated since Halloween of 2023. The devs have started to work on a different game and the servers are down in CatOS. I’m starting to believe CatOS is never coming back.
Very good game but I don’t like how the battery of the flashlight runs out
Can I get the discord link bc the other ones are old but 5 star game also game is back up for those who don’t know
CATOS IS BACK BABY!!!!!!!!!!
It kind of reminds me of FNAF cuz of the doors
Really good game I am being for real…
The game hasn’t had a update since Halloween, if you update the game it will revive it

reviews.review_title: Good game, but I can't play
reviews.review_description:
I've always loved Catos since I first played it, but when I log in, it says I have an incompatible version when I just updated the game. However, it's still a good game, and people should play it
Edit: I was opening the old build named "Catos VR." Not Catos, got all figured out

developer_response.body: Hi, this issue was fixed. Please update
